name: Daibetic, Crunchy Chocolate Raisin Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the margarine and dry milk until crumbly.
2. Add cocoa, artificial sweetener, and vanilla extract. Blend until smooth.
3. Gradually add evaporated milk and continue blending until almost smooth.
4. Fold in Rice Krispies cereal with your hands until combined.
5. Spread the mixture into a baking dish and shape into two 10-inch long rolls.
6. Wrap each roll tightly in clear plastic wrap.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
8. Cut into 1/2 inch thick slices for serving.
9. Store leftovers in the refrigerator. One serving equals 1/5 cup milk, 1/40th bread, and 1/20th fruit exchange. Approximately 30 calories per serving.
